additional_rules.name: from-latest-tag
additional_rules.message: FROM with :latest tag — pin to a specific version or SHA digest for reproducible builds
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace :latest with a specific version tag (e.g., :21-jre-alpine) or SHA digest (@sha256:...)

additional_rules.name: missing-healthcheck
additional_rules.message: Dockerfile has ENTRYPOINT but no HEALTHCHECK — orchestrators cannot detect unhealthy containers
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add a HEALTHCHECK instruction: HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s CMD wget --spider http://localhost:PORT/health || exit 1

additional_rules.name: running-as-root
additional_rules.message: Dockerfile has no USER instruction — container will run as root
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add a non-root user: RUN addgroup --system app && adduser --system --ingroup app app, then USER app before ENTRYPOINT

additional_rules.name: add-instead-of-copy
additional_rules.message: ADD used for non-archive file — use COPY for predictable behavior
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace ADD with COPY unless you need tar extraction or remote URL fetching

additional_rules.name: env-secret-in-dockerfile
additional_rules.message: Secret value in ENV/ARG instruction — secrets persist in image layers and are visible via docker inspect
additional_rules.fix_hint: Use BuildKit secret mounts: RUN --mount=type=secret,id=mysecret cat /run/secrets/mysecret
